--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local local function P(P)return B[P+(968581+-911009)]end do local P=string.sub local G=math.floor local o=table.insert local w=B local W=table.concat local p=string.len local H=type local return(function(B,o,w,W,p,H,I,q,y,l,f,N,K,a,e,D,j,Y,G,b)K,Y,G,N,b,y,f,l,q,D,a,j,e=function(B,P)local o=q(P)local w=function(w,W)return G(B,{w,W},P,o)end return w
